positive: A majestic celestial owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by swirling bioluminescent floral elements and cosmic dust. The composition is centered, featuring highly intricate, symmetrical linework and clean, graphic silhouettes against a deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. Utilize a neo-vintage, illustrative engraving style mixed with modern vaporwave geometry. Strong contrast is key: crisp white and gold line work against the dark, saturated background. Perfect for a seamless apparel print. Wallpaper texture, high detail, 8k, vector quality.
